items: Import `parse_docx` from `backend.core.file_toolkit` to extract text from Word documents in file upload features.
Enable file upload UI via `update_app_features` before modifying backend handlers to ensure frontend-backend synchronization.
Create dedicated system prompts for file content that analyze document themes and structure before generating responses.
Support UTF-8 encoded .txt files and .docx formats when implementing document content extraction.
Route file attachments through content extraction pipelines in `handle_chat` using conditional logic before LLM processing.
